name: coordinate
description: Multi-agent coordination via wave-based task planning.

tools.description: Declare a complete, dependency-aware execution plan. Creates a persistent plan.json manifest in a dedicated workspace directory, initialises empty output placeholder files, validates the dependency graph, and returns the first wave of tasks that are immediately ready to start.

workspace.description: Unique name for this plan's workspace folder. Simple name only — no slashes or dots.

tasks.description: Complete list of ALL tasks in the plan.

depends_on.description: IDs of tasks that must be marked done before this task can start.

output_file.description: Filename this task will write its output to.

tools.description: Mark a task in the active plan as done or failed, persist the updated plan.json, and return the next wave of tasks that are now ready to start.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the plan workspace directory.

task_id.description: The id of the task that has just completed.

status.description: Outcome of the task. Defaults to 'done'.

tools.description: Read and return the current state of a plan from its plan.json manifest. Useful for resuming after an interruption or diagnosing a blocked plan.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the plan workspace directory.
